name: Outin Futures Co., Ltd
summary: Outin Futures Co., Ltd operates as a design and cosmetic development company worldwide. It provides package design solutions, product development, and research and development services to the beauty and health industry. The company offers professional ODM services for sheet mask, hydrogel mask and patch, skin care, sun care, and face make up applications. Outin Futures Co., Ltd was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
